items: Oral Communication on Closed Session Items Only

If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Reconvene to Regular Session at Approximately 7:00p.m.
Report Out on Closed Session from 2.24.21
Welcome by the School Board President

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

Approval of Measure T Bond Program Tracking List for Items Under $20K
Approval of Asphalt Replacement Project Construction Agreement for Hoover Community School with Galeb Paving
Discussion on Recent iReady Diagnostic Exam Results
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 1340 - Access to District Records
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 3280 - Sale or Lease of Property
Second Reading and Approval of Board ByLaw 9100 - Organization
Approval of Addendum to 2020-21 Measure U Application for McKinley Institute of Technology
Approval of Addendum to 2020-21 Measure U Application for Roy Cloud School
Approval of Disposal of Dated and Damaged Library Materials
Approval of Amended Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Adrian Amandi for Visual Impairment and Assistive Technology Services
Approval of the Second Amendment to the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and the National Urban Alliance
Approval of Release of Temporary Teachers
Approval of Public Health Institute's Safely Opening Schools Collaborative
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - January, 2021
Other Business/Suggested Items For Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Agenda Schedule

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No formal agenda changes announced during 'Changes to the Agenda' section. Board President asked 'Any changes to the agenda?' and proceeded directly to motion to approve agenda without announcing any pulled items or reorderings.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: All those in favor? Oh, roll call, please. Trustee wells. Aye. Trustee lawson. Aye. Trustee marquez. Aye. Vice President Diaz locum. Aye. President mcavoy. Aye.
